jobs.purpose: Sweep resource_bookings for rows in status='pending' with created_at + 30 minutes past-due. Transitions them to 'cancelled' with cascade_trigger='expired_pending'. Ensures pending-approval bookings don't linger indefinitely + free up their slot for other users.
steps: SELECT id FROM resource_bookings WHERE status='pending' AND created_at < now() - interval '30 minutes' AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 500
For each: transition to status='cancelled' + set cancellation_reason='pending_approval_expired' + fire BookingCancelled with cascade_trigger='expired_pending'
If pass credit was consumed on the pending create: restore 1 credit to the pass (double-write safety — pending bookings don't hold credits in normal flow, but Wave 4 approvals may)

jobs.purpose: Sweep resource_bookings for confirmed rows past starts_at + 15 min without a checked_in_at. Transitions them to 'no_show' + fires BookingMarkedNoShow (trigger='automated_job').
steps: SELECT id FROM resource_bookings WHERE status='confirmed' AND starts_at < now() - interval '15 minutes' AND checked_in_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 500
For each: transition to status='no_show' + set marked_at + fire BookingMarkedNoShow with trigger='automated_job'

jobs.purpose: Sweep resource_bookings for confirmed rows past ends_at + 15 min. Transitions them to 'completed' + fires BookingCompleted. Note: skips rows that were marked no_show by MarkNoShowJob (status != confirmed at this point).
steps: SELECT id FROM resource_bookings WHERE status='confirmed' AND ends_at < now() - interval '15 minutes' AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 500
For each: transition to status='completed' + set completed_at + fire BookingCompleted

jobs.purpose: Daily sweep of day_passes past valid_on_date with consumed_at IS NULL. Marks them expired + fires DayPassExpired. No refund flow.
steps: SELECT id FROM day_passes WHERE valid_on_date < today() AND consumed_at IS NULL LIMIT 5000
For each: set expired_at + fire DayPassExpired

jobs.purpose: Daily sweep of passes past valid_until OR with used_credits >= total_credits (belt-and-suspenders — the observer already fires PassExhausted on the crossing increment). Fires PassExpired for time-expired rows.
steps: SELECT id FROM passes WHERE valid_until < today() AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 5000
For each row past valid_until: fire PassExpired
SELECT id FROM passes WHERE used_credits >= total_credits AND deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (audit row with type='PassExhausted' in last 24h)
For each: fire PassExhausted (recovery path for missed observer fires)

jobs.purpose: Weekly sweep of soft-deleted facilities past retention (7 years for financial records associated with the facility). Hard-deletes the row only when NO day_passes or passes still reference it (RESTRICT FKs enforce this at DB level too — the job just cleans up rows that pass all checks).
steps: SELECT id FROM facilities WHERE deleted_at < now() - interval '7 years' LIMIT 500
For each: attempt hard delete; catch FK RESTRICT and record as 'retention_blocked' in metrics

jobs.purpose: Individual reminder dispatch. Scheduled by BookingReminderScheduler at booking-create time (24h + 1h before starts_at). Fires the BookingReminderNotification unless the booking has been cancelled since scheduling.
steps: Load booking; refuse dispatch when status != 'confirmed' (booking may have been cancelled)
Refuse dispatch when the recipient has opted out of facility.booking_reminder category
Fire BookingReminderNotification via the notifications module

jobs.purpose: Weekly audit sweep to catch bookings referencing retired facilities that should have been cancelled by the FacilityRetired cascade. A finding here indicates a race + fires BookingOverlapDetected (misuse of the event? no — same class of ops-alarm: unexpected state).
steps: SELECT b.id FROM resource_bookings b JOIN facilities f ON f.id = b.facility_id WHERE f.status='retired' AND b.status IN ('pending','confirmed') AND b.starts_at > now()
For each: fire BookingCancelled with cascade_trigger='facility_retired' + cancellation_reason='reconciler_orphan_cleanup'
Emit metric academorix.facility.reconcile.orphans_found — should always be 0

jobs.purpose: Weekly audit to catch double-bookings that slipped through the SERIALIZABLE overlap check. Every finding fires BookingOverlapDetected. This job's counter should always report 0 findings.
steps: For each facility: SELECT a.id, b.id FROM resource_bookings a JOIN resource_bookings b ON a.facility_id=b.facility_id AND a.id < b.id WHERE a.status IN ('pending','confirmed') AND b.status IN ('pending','confirmed') AND tsrange(a.starts_at, a.ends_at) && tsrange(b.starts_at, b.ends_at)
For each overlap pair: fire BookingOverlapDetected with detected_by='reconciler_job'

jobs.purpose: GDPR data-minimisation. Sweeps day_passes issued to anonymous walk-ins (issued_to_user_id IS NULL) 90 days past consumed_at. Replaces issued_to_profile_name + issued_to_profile_phone with '[REDACTED]' but preserves the receipt_number + price_amount_cents + payment_method for financial retention.
steps: SELECT id FROM day_passes WHERE issued_to_user_id IS NULL AND consumed_at < now() - interval '90 days' AND issued_to_profile_name != '[REDACTED]' LIMIT 2000
For each: UPDATE day_passes SET issued_to_profile_name='[REDACTED]', issued_to_profile_phone='[REDACTED]', issued_to_profile_age_band='unknown'
